name: Chart Build Explain — Bar Growth with Annotation
description: Bar chart grows from zero height with staggered timing, then a highlight pulse draws attention to a specific bar while others dim, and finally a callout annotation slides in with a connecting line to explain the insight.

barCount.description: Number of bars in the chart

highlightIndex.description: Index of the bar to highlight and annotate (0-based)

annotationDelay.description: Delay in ms after highlight before annotation appears

barWidth.description: Width of each bar in pixels

growStagger.description: Stagger delay in ms between each bar starting its growth

highlightScale.description: Scale factor for the highlighted bar pulse

dimOpacity.description: Opacity of non-highlighted bars during annotation phase

items.label: string
items.value: number (0-1 normalized, or absolute if maxBarHeight adjusts)

sub_primitives.name: Bar Grow
sub_primitives.description: Height animation from 0 to target with eased-out cubic timing. Staggered per bar.

sub_primitives.name: Callout Appear
sub_primitives.description: Annotation callout slides in from the right with opacity fade and a connecting line draws from the bar to the label.

when_to_use: Data reveals — building a chart to highlight a key metric
Metric highlights — drawing attention to a standout value
Financial presentations — showing growth with editorial annotation
when_to_avoid: More than 10 bars — readability degrades at small sizes
Scenes under 2.5 seconds — the 3-phase animation needs time
Montage personality — hard cuts conflict with gradual bar build
ai_guidance: Use layer type 'chart_build_explain' with a 'bars' array of { label, value, color? } and an 'annotation' string. Configure via chart_config overrides. Phase 1 (0-50%) grows bars, Phase 2 (50-75%) highlights target bar, Phase 3 (75-100%) slides in annotation. Duration ~3.2s.
